untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 'contrarian sentiment >65th percentile extreme' which cannot be directly mapped to available technical indicators. Used RSI as proxy for extremity but true sentiment/contrarian positioning data is unavailable. Also 'second candle of pullback or reversal gap' requires multi-bar pattern recognition not expressible in single-condition format.
translation_notes: Mapped 2.0 standard deviations from 20-period mean to price_pos_20 extremes (>2σ above = price_pos_20 > 1.0 for short, <2σ below = price_pos_20 < 0.0 for long). Volume spike (1.25x multiplier) mapped to vol_ratio_20. Sentiment extreme (65th percentile) approximated using RSI extremes (>65 for bullish extreme, <35 for bearish extreme) as proxy. Profit target 2-3% rounded to 3% for simplicity. Stop loss at 2.0σ expressed as percentage stop_loss_pct. Time exit set to 15 bars per specification.
